name: 楊神珠
objective:
顧客關係管理主要目的是了解企業與顧客之關係，促使顧客滿意及忠誠回應而產生終身價值，進而提昇企業獲利，其內容包括顧客關係管理的概念與本質、顧客行為、顧客資料探勘、顧客關係管理系統、顧客關係管理專案之規劃與管理、顧客關係管理的績效衡量、顧客關係管理實務研討。商業智慧 (Business Intelligence, BI)，是企業利用現代資訊技術收集、管理和分析結構化與非結構化的企業資料與資訊，創造和累積企業知識與見解，以改善企業決策品質與採取有效的企業行動，進而提升企業各方面績效。由基本現場管理 (Shop Floor Control) 需求談起，然後介紹製造資訊分類與收集技術（包括 RFID），也將包括資料庫與資料倉儲觀念，最後介紹 BI 於顧客關係管理之應用。課堂中也將輔以目前市面上商用 BI 套裝軟體，並將其專業上相關資訊在此系統上實際應用，體驗 BI 對企業之重要性。
The objectives of Customer Relationship Management (CRM) are to study the relationship between corporation and customer, to increase the profit by customer lifetime value through customer satisfaction and royalty. The topics of this course includes concepts and context of CRM, consumer behavior, customer data mining, CRM system, planning and management of CRM projects, performance measurement of CRM. Business intelligence (BI) systems refer to applications and technologies which gather and analyze data about company operations. It then provides a comprehensive correlation of those factors, such as metrics on sales, production, internal operations, and helps managers to make better business decisions. This course focuses on applications of BI in CRM, with the introduction of shop floor control concepts and data collection techniques such as RFID, along with database and data warehouse concepts. Hands-on experience in BI software implementation is also emphasized.
schedule:
Week 01-02  顧客關係管理導論            	
Week 03       顧客關係管理的銷售與行銷
Week 04-05   發展、維繫、強化顧客關係	 
Week 06-07    顧客不滿意與抱怨的處理   	
Week 08 -09  顧客滿意度與忠誠度                   
Week 10-11  顧客關係管理策略規劃       	 
Week 12-13     CRM 個案                       	 
Week 13-14   顧客價值分析 | CRM 個案                   	 
Week 15-16  顧客資料探勘與商業智慧     	 
Week 17-18  專題演講與期末考試

補充： 培養顧客關係  
a. 管理顧客關係與培養忠誠度 
b. 申訴處理及服務補救
c.  模擬軟體
d.  期末考試週
scorePolicy:
Evaluation/Assessments：

Mid Term      25%	( Group Presentation, individual report )
Final Term    25%	( Paper Exam + Group Presentation )

Participation  50%  ( 20% Attendance on time got 2 points, 30% Class  participation, such as asking and answering questions)
Proof of documents required, such as a sick leave notice, can be provided later.
A wrap-up presentation of the previous class may be required in the next class.
360-degree evaluation at the end of the class by peers.
